resources.string: 1. The problem with the watermark in the lower right corner of the icon
2. How to turn on permissions (Install icon)
3. Turn on positioning permission for precise positioning (weather widget)
A beautiful design can lift your mood
A fresh style can make every moment feel better
A fresh theme for a fresh start
A new theme can completely change how your phone feels
A small daily habit to keep your phone feeling new
Select a dictionary to add. Dictionaries in .dict format can be downloaded %s.
To which language should the dictionary \"%1$s\" for %2$s be added?
Use device personal dictionary to store learned words
Ads have not loaded or internet connection error
Allow us to access your location to show the weather on the app
Are you sure you want to exit?
Are you sure you want to reset the default keyboard?
Capitalize the first word of each sentence
Spacebar and punctuation automatically correct mistyped words
Auto-renewal, cancel anytime in Subscriptions on Google Play.
Auto-renewal, manage your subscriptions in Account Settings on the Play Store app after the purchase. You won’t be charged if you cancel before your trial ends
Automatically insert space after punctuation when typing a new word
Save or load from file. Warning: restore will overwrite existing data
Use the previous word in making suggestions
Use your biometric or screen lock to continue
ChatGPT server is overloaded, please try again in a few minutes
Unknown library file. Are you sure you got it from a trusted source and it is for \'%s\'?
Choose a theme that reflects your style
Select a widget to click on
Claim to receive coins every day
Are you sure you want to clear the clipboard data?
Click \"Add\" to add it to the home screen
Click add widget to Home Screen and select you like the widget to the home screen
Click on the \"Install\" button and then Add to Home Screen
Click \"Install\" to pop up a prompt to open the pop-up permission window, and click \"OK\" to jump to the system permissions page to enable the permission to create shortcuts.

Click the black button at the bottom to jump to the home screen and Long press the home screen, or use two fingers to zoom (this operation may vary depending on the device) to enter edit mode, then select Add Widget
Visit facebook.com/device and enter the code shown above.
Unexpected error while downloading an image.
To connect your account, open the Facebook app on your mobile device and check for notifications.
You\'re in control - choose what info you want to share with apps.
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Continue Writing, Tone Change, Grammar Check, Auto Reply, Powered by Chat GPT API
Crash logs and app interactions to use for analytics and advertising purposes
Create canned messages now to save time
Create your perfect home screen with unlimited themes, wallpapers, widgets & icons.
Creative themes for a better,\nprettier screen
Cancelling, required permissions are not granted
Layouts (except symbols) expose internal settings which may still change. If that happens, the custom layout may not work properly any more.
Customize your screen the way you like
Set image for day or night mode?
Perform a swipe from the delete key to select and remove bigger portions of text at once
Describe how you\'d like to reply
Error: Selected file is not a valid dictionary file
The selected file is for %1$s, but %2$s was expected. Still use it for %2$s?
Error: script not compatible with this keyboard
Warning: Disabling this setting will clear learned data
Discover styles that match your mood today.
Do you want to set this live wallpaper?
Do you want to set up this charging animation?
Easy to use Notepad, To-Do Lists, Reminders, Calendar, Recording & Hand-Drawn
If disabled, clipboard key will paste clipboard content if any
Please enable overlay permission to use this feature
Failed to create Camera image file
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
Experience advanced AI Chatbot powered by the ChatGPT and GPT-4o models
Explore the perfect invitation card design for weddings, birthdays and paties
Explore themes that match your personality
Use your face or screen lock to continue
Failed to download charging animation. Please check your internet connection and try again
Failed to download icon. Please check your internet connection and try again
Failed to download wallpaper. Please check your internet connection and try again
Failed to download widget. Please check your internet connection and try again
Find a look that fits your mood today
Find Theme Pack and select what you like to add to your home screen
This device does not have a fingerprint sensor
Too many attempts. Please try again later.
Use your fingerprint or screen lock to continue

For the first time, a pop-up window prompts to open the location permission. Click OK to jump to the system positioning page to enable the Allow all the time positioning permission to obtain more precise positioning. After successfully adding the desktop, you need to wait for about 2 to 3 seconds to obtain the weather data.
No PIN, pattern, or password set.
This device does not support PIN, pattern, or password.
See the suggested word while gesturing
Input a word by sliding through the letters
Input spaces during gestures by gliding to the space key
Get lifetime access to all Themes,\nWidgets & Wallpapers
Get lifetime access to all themes with %s%% off.
Go back to the home screen and enjoy it
Go unlimited for a full year
Here are some examples of information we collect while you use this app:

► Long-pressing the Clipboard Key (the optional one in the suggestion strip) pastes system clipboard contents.

► Long-pressing keys in the suggestion strip toolbar pins them to the suggestion strip.

► Long-press the Comma-key to access Clipboard View, Emoji View, One-handed Mode, Settings, or Switch Language:
\t• Emoji View and Language Switch will disappear if you have the corresponding key enabled;
\t• For some layouts it\'s not the Comma-key, but the key at the same position (e.g. it\'s \'q\' for Dvorak layout).

► When incognito mode is enabled, no words will be learned, and no emojis will be added to recents.

► Press the Incognito icon to access the toolbar.

► Sliding key input: Swipe from shift to another key to type a single uppercase key:
\t• This also works for the \'?123\' key to type a single symbol from the symbols keyboard, and for related keys.

► Long-press a suggestion in the suggestion strip to show more suggestions, and a delete button to remove this suggestion.

► Swipe up from a suggestion to open more suggestions, and release on the suggestion to select it.

► Long-press an entry in the clipboard history to pin it (keep it in clipboard until you unpin).

► You can add dictionaries by opening them in a file explorer:
\t• This only works with content-uris and not with file-uris, meaning that it may not work with some file explorers.

Debug mode / debug APK

\t• Long-press a suggestion to show the source dictionary.

\t• When using debug APK, you can find Debug Settings within the Advanced Preferences,though the usefulness is limited except for dumping dictionaries into the log.

\t• In the event of an application crash, you will be prompted whether you want the crash logs when you open the Settings.

\t• When using multilingual typing, space bar will show an confidence value used for determining the currently used language.

\t• Suggestions will have some tiny numbers on top showing some internal score and source dictionary (can be disabled). ► For users doing manual backups with root access: Starting at Android 7, the shared preferences file is not in the default location, because the app is using %s.
This is necessary so the settings can be read before the device is unlocked, e.g. at boot.
The file is located in /data/user_de/0/package_id/shared_prefs/, though this may depend on the device and Android version.
Show features that may go unnoticed
Hold on, your text is on the way!
Manage your subscriptions in Account Settings on the Google Play App after purchase
If so, could you please rate us? ��
Information specific to the device such as operating system version, hardware type, and IP address for advertising and optimizing our network
Just save it to see the final result.
Let your phone express who you are
A fast ImageView (and Drawable) that supports rounded corners (and ovals or circles) based on the original example from Romain Guy.

You will need the library for \'%s\'. Incompatible libraries may crash when using gesture typing. \n\nWarning: loading external code can be a security risk. Only use a library from a source you trust.
Provide a native library to enable gesture typing
Make your phone better every day
Once you copy some text, it will show up here. You can also pin clips so they won\'t disappear later.
You can manage or add clips here for quick access.
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Maximize productivity with AI\nassistant ready at your fingertips
Select a file in a compatible format. Information about the formats is available %s.
Auto-correct even when not explicitly requested by the input field
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s

Without a dictionary, you will only get suggestions for text you entered before.
\n You can download dictionaries %1$s, or check whether a dictionary for \"%2$s\" can be downloaded directly %3$s.
Allow app to send you notifications?
Offer applies only to the first year
Thanks for your interest.\nWe will share more once you\'re back online.
You are back online! Let\'s pick up where we left off
You are back online! Continue learning about %s
We\'ll send you a notification with a link to the advertiser site.
Open ad when you\'re back online.
Our app uses high-quality images, so loading times may be longer.
Our app uses high-quality images, so loading times may be longer. Thank you for your patience
Our Privacy Policy contains comprehensive information regarding the data we collect, as well as how we process it. We encourage you to review our Privacy Policy for more details.
The package doesn\'t load. Please check your internet connection and try again
Pay once and enjoy full access forever.
Camera permission is needed to take a picture. Please allow permission from Settings > Permissions.
Personalize your phone your own way
Please be aware that Android consistently issues a warning message upon keyboard addition. Rest assured, we do not gather your personal data
Please enable the read and write external storage to use this app
Please set up at least one property before saving the theme
Please type or copy some text to analyze
Plug in and experience the feature right away ����

This subscription gives you unlimited access to our app contents library. If you don not cancel before the trial ends, you will be automatically charged weekly or yearly fees until you cancel. With the Lifetime package, you only need to buy it once and permanently unlock all the features of the application.

This subscription gives you unlimited access to our app contents library. If you don not cancel before the trial ends, you will be automatically charged weekly or yearly fees until you cancel. With the Lifetime package, you only need to buy it once and permanently unlock all the features of the application.
Ignore other apps’ request to disable suggestions
Do not suggest potentially offensive words
Debug settings enabled. Find them in advanced settings.
Physical Alt key shows the emoji palette
Change input method with space key
Long pressing space key will prompt input method selection menu
Relax with a calm and clean design

Really replace user-added dictionary "%1$s"?

Current dictionary:
%2$s

New dictionary:
%3$s
There\'s not enough memory to add this image.
Allow Ad to store image in Picture gallery?
Allow Ad to create a calendar event?
Schedule planner agenda 2024, monthly weekly yearly planner digital widget
Enter your screen lock to continue
Select the widget you like on the home page and save the size you like to the My widget Library
Select colors for text and backgrounds
%s is already enabled in your Languages & input settings, so this step is done. On to the next one!
Please check \"%s\" in your Languages & input settings. This will authorize it to run on your device.
Next, select \"%s\" as your active text-input method.
Now you can type in all your favorite apps with %s.
Are you sure you want to delete?
Show numbers on a separate row
Show hints if long-pressing a key triggers additional functionality
Show variants defined in keyboard languages (default)
Show more letters with diacritics in popup
Display application icon in the launcher
Display visual cue while sliding from Shift or Symbol keys
Some permissions are required to continue. Please grant the required permissions from the settings.
Something went wrong. Please try again
Swipe upwards on the spacebar to change the language
Swipe on the spacebar to move the cursor
Plug in a headset to hear password keys spoken aloud.
Start sentences with a capital letter
Start the week with a new look
Support for multiple email accounts, write emails faster & smarter with AI power
Swipe left and right to select and install your favorite widget
Take a look at your phone ��
Take notes with notepad &\nnotebook, keep diary journal
Tap to here to use AI keyboard
Tap the language to open settings
That feeling when it looks just right
The charging animation is set successfully
This feature will personalize your response based on the content you type in. You can enter the response state (Decline, conside, interested...), text length or tone
This function will provide responds based on your chosen status. You can customize reply prompts for detailed, clear responses, and save them for reuse.

This is due to the system limitations of some android models. There is currently no solution. We can only wait for the subsequent system to adapt to the software, and we will try our best to optimize it.
To provide you with themes to decorate your home screen, this app only collects a limited amount of data.
Trusted by millions of users worldwide
Try a new look and enjoy a better phone experience
Try a new theme for a fresh feeling
Type to try the new keyboard...
Both input and output Uri must be specified
Therefore, override color resource (ucrop_color_toolbar_widget) in your app to make it work on pre-L devices
Unlock all themes, wallpapers, widgets & icons for a full year.
Try to detect URLs and similar as a single word
Use names from Contacts for suggestions and corrections
Spell checker uses entries from your contact list
Double tap on spacebar inserts a period followed by a space
Learn from your communications and typed data to improve suggestions
You don\'t have any words in the user dictionary. To add a word, tap the Add (+) button.
This word is already present in the %s user dictionary. Please type another one.
You have already received the coin today. Please try the next day
Voice Recorder & Voice memo, easily record audio and sound with high quality
Want more coins? Watch an ad for %s coins, or grab %s%% off Lifetime to unlock everything anytime.
Watch a video to earn %d gems
Watch an Ad to get %s Coins
Welcome back - enjoy our %s%% offer for the Lifetime
When the style fits, everything feels better
You have scrolled to the last item
You’re Currently Upgraded to Premium!\nThank you for trusting and using our app.
Your data will be lost, do you want to save it?
Your phone deserves a new vibe
Your phone shows who you are
Your theme is almost ready — just save it.
Your widget looks great — just save it.
